ref_contract_no.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql:
SELECT PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as membername , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.crem_amount, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type, ( select nvl(sum(fund_new),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_new where sc_lon_m_req_fund_new.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) as fund_new
, ( select nvl(sum(fund_real),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 ) as fund_ret
, ( select nvl(sum(fund_real),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 and deposit_account_no = 'NEW' ) as fund_ret_old
, ( select nvl(sum(fund_real),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 and deposit_account_no <> 'NEW' ) as fund_ret_50
, ( select nvl(sum(fund_int),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 and deposit_account_no <> 'NEW' ) as fund_int_50
, FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) as loan_type , FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type )) as loan_type_description ,
sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , to_tdate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'dd month')||' '||'พ.ศ.'||to_tdate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'yyyy') as thia_begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date , sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer , sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status,
sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no ,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id ,
sc_com_m_branch.branch_id , sc_com_m_branch.branch_name ,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id
,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.sort_order ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name ,sc_lon_m_contract.paid_loan_id
,( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in( 'CLR' , 'TRL' ) ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) as principal_amount
,( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in( 'CLR' , 'TRL' ) ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) as interest_amount
,si_security_user.user_name as paid_name ,sc_lon_m_rule.account_id , ( select sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name from sc_acc_m_account_master where sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_lon_m_rule.account_id ) as account_name FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_com_m_branch , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,si_security_user ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_lon_m_contract.paid_loan_br ) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and si_security_user.user_id = sc_lon_m_contract.paid_loan_id and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money not in ( 'CSH' , 'ATM' ) and sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status = '1'
and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no

r_ktm_loan_paid_cash_not_nest_loan_old.sql: SELECT sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no, sc_com_m_receipt_item.description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount , sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount, decode( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item , 'LON' , sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name ) as loan_type_des, sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.sort_order FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in( 'CLR' , 'TRL' ) ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) )

r_ktm_loan_paid_cash_not_nest_paid_mpaid.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no, (case money_type_id when 'TRB' then pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no , '###-#-#####-#######' ) when 'TRD' then 'โอน สอ.'||' '||pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no , '##-##########' ) else trim( money_type_name ) end ) as money_type , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_code, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.paid_amount FROM sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type WHERE sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = {0}
